summary: Comprehensive testing of SCOI V1.2 multi-agent investigation pipeline, ZIP download, and investigation export features. Backend API testing achieved 95.5% success rate (21/22 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all 8 dashboard tabs, Download ZIP button functionality, investigation interface with expandable sections, and past investigations display including Mokwena investigation.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Blocks CSV export functionality for investigations

integration_issues.issue: Search for 'Thabo' does not return Thabo Mokwena in results

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials (admin@scoi.gov.za / SCOI2026!Admin)
Dashboard loads with Download ZIP button in header
All 8 tabs present: Entity Search, Network Graph, Asset Tracing, Watchlist, Investigate, Red Flags, Data Ingestion, Audit Logs
Investigate tab shows past investigations including Mokwena Network Investigation
New Investigation form opens and accepts input
Multi-agent investigation pipeline runs successfully (5 agents)
Investigation results display with confidence, compliance score, red flags count
Investigation sections are expandable (red flags, audit trail, report)
ZIP download endpoint returns valid ZIP file
All navigation between tabs works smoothly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix CSV export endpoint returning 500 error in /api/investigations/{id}/export/csv. Minor issue: improve entity search to ensure 'Thabo' query returns Thabo Mokwena in results.
